ui.hud.health.context: HUD label above the health bar. One word, very short.

ui.hud.credits.context: HUD label above the persistent credit-balance number (the player's money). One word, very short.

ui.hud.earned.context: HUD label above the credits-earned-this-run number. One word, very short.

ui.hud.destroyed.context: HUD label above the kill count. One word, very short.

ui.hud.enemies.context: HUD label above the live-enemy count. One word, very short.

ui.help.source: W / ↑ — thrust · S / ↓ — reverse · A / D or ← → — turn · Space — fire · F — rocket
ui.help.context: On-screen controls cheatsheet (HTML). Keep the key glyphs (W, ↑, S, Space, F, arrows) as-is; translate only the action words (thrust/reverse/turn/fire/rocket).

ui.overlay.gameover.context: Overlay title shown when the player's ship is destroyed.

ui.overlay.ship_destroyed.context: Overlay title on player death (variant). Short.

ui.overlay.victory.context: Overlay title when a level is cleared. Upbeat.

ui.overlay.sector_cleared.context: Fallback victory subtitle when a level has no custom victory line.

ui.button.restart.context: Button on the game-over overlay (retry the level). Short.

ui.button.continue.context: Button on the victory overlay — proceeds to the Hangar screen. Short.

ui.button.take_off.context: Primary button on the welcome screen that starts the game. Keep the 🚀 emoji.

ui.welcome.greeting.context: Welcome-screen heading. 'Sentinel' is the player's in-game title — keep it.

ui.welcome.intro.source: Pirates are raiding our home system — we need you to push them back. Good news: you've got a fast, nimble ship. Use that agility — keep moving, out-turn them, and don't let them pin you down.
ui.welcome.intro.context: Welcome-screen intro paragraph. 2–3 sentences, motivating, second person.

ui.welcome.pick.context: Label above the ship-picker cards on the welcome screen.

ui.briefing.title.context: Title of the between-levels briefing overlay (shown after clearing a level, before the next). Short.

ui.hangar.title.context: Title of the Hangar screen — the between-battles screen shown after a victory (currently shows the next mission briefing). Short.

ui.hangar.default.source: Stand by for new orders, Sentinel.
ui.hangar.default.context: Hangar message shown when there is no mission briefing (e.g. after the final level). 'Sentinel' is the player's title.

ui.shop.loadout.context: Hangar shop column title — the items currently equipped on the ship. Short.

ui.shop.stash.context: Hangar shop column title — items the player owns but hasn't equipped (their inventory). Short.

ui.shop.shop.context: Hangar shop column title — the catalog of items the player can buy. Short.

ui.shop.slot.hull.context: Equipment slot label (the ship's hull / armor). Short.

ui.shop.slot.engine.context: Equipment slot label (the ship's engine → acceleration). Short.

ui.shop.slot.thruster.context: Equipment slot label (maneuvering thrusters → turn rate). Short.

ui.shop.slot.repair.context: Equipment slot label (passive hull-repair drone). Short.

ui.shop.slot.gun.context: Weapon slot label (the primary bullet weapon, fired with Space). Short.

ui.shop.slot.rocket.context: Weapon slot label (the homing rocket, fired with F). Short.

ui.shop.empty.context: Placeholder shown in an equipment slot that has nothing installed.

ui.shop.empty_stash.context: Message in the Stash column when the player owns no unequipped items.

ui.shop.empty_shop.context: Message in the Shop column when no buyable items match the active filter.

ui.shop.owned.context: Badge on a shop item the player already has (equipped on the ship + in the stash). {n} is the integer total count; the '×N' notation avoids plurals. Short.

ui.shop.free.context: Shown as an item's price when it costs 0 credits (the economy is inert until real prices are set).

ui.shop.action.install.context: Button on a stash item — equip it onto the ship. Short.

ui.shop.action.unequip.context: Button on an equipped item — move it back to the stash. Short.

ui.shop.action.sell.context: Button on a stash or equipped item — sell it for credits (75% of price). Short.

ui.shop.action.buy.context: Button on a shop item — purchase it into the stash. Short.

ui.shop.stat.hp.context: Stat label — hit points (hull durability). Very short; 'HP' may stay as-is.

ui.shop.stat.accel.context: Stat label — acceleration. Very short, abbreviated.

ui.shop.stat.maneuver.context: Stat label — maneuverability / turn rate. Very short, abbreviated.

ui.shop.stat.weight.context: Stat label — mass/weight (heavier = slower). Very short.

ui.shop.stat.dmg.context: Stat label — weapon damage per hit. Very short, abbreviated.

ui.shop.stat.rof.context: Stat label — rate of fire (shots per second). Very short, abbreviated.

ui.shop.stat.reload.context: Stat label — rocket reload time in seconds (followed by e.g. '5s'). Short.

ui.shop.stat.speed.context: Stat label — projectile (bullet) travel speed. Short.

ui.shop.stat.range.context: Stat label — weapon maximum range (distance). Short.

ui.shop.stat.blast.context: Stat label — rocket blast/AoE radius. Short.

ui.shop.stat.maxspeed.context: Stat label — engine maximum speed cap. Short.

ui.shop.stat.heal.context: Stat label — repair-drone healing, followed by e.g. '+1/3s' (HP per interval). Short.

ui.shop.stat.cap.context: Stat label — repair-drone heal cap as a percentage of max HP (e.g. '80%'). Short.

ui.shop.filter.all.context: Shop filter chip — show every item type. Short.

ui.shop.filter.hull.context: Shop filter chip — show only hulls. Short.

ui.shop.filter.engine.context: Shop filter chip — show only engines. Short.

ui.shop.filter.thruster.context: Shop filter chip — show only thrusters. Short.

ui.shop.filter.repair.context: Shop filter chip — show only repair drones. Short.

ui.shop.filter.weapon.context: Shop filter chip — show only weapons. Short.

ui.shop.cant_launch.source: Can't take off — a required slot (hull, engine, or thrusters) is empty.
ui.shop.cant_launch.context: Note under a disabled Take-off button when a required equipment slot is empty.

ui.shop.err_credits.context: Error shown when the player tries to buy an item they can't afford.

ui.shop.err_locked.context: Error shown when a shop action is attempted before the shop is unlocked.

ui.shop.err_network.context: Error shown when a shop request fails to reach the server.

ui.shop.err_generic.context: Fallback error for a shop action that the server rejected.

ui.title.context: Game wordmark / brand name. Stays Latin in every locale.

ui.touch.fire.context: Touch-control fire button label (mobile). Uppercase, short.

ui.pause.pause.context: Accessible label/tooltip for the pause button (shows a ⏸ icon) at the top of the screen. Freezes the fight. Short.

ui.pause.resume.context: Accessible label/tooltip for the pause button once paused (shows a ▶ play icon) — tap to continue the fight. Short.

ui.pause.paused.context: Large centered label shown over the frozen battlefield while the game is paused. One word.

ui.pause.play.context: Button under the centered 'Paused' label — resumes the fight. Keep the ▶ play glyph; translate the word.

ui.fullscreen.context: Touch-only button (welcome / hangar / pause) that re-enters fullscreen to hide the mobile browser chrome (URL bar, tabs). Keep the ⛶ glyph; translate the words.

ui.credits.doubled.context: Victory subtitle tail; {credits} is the doubled credits earned (integer). '×2' is the level-clear bonus notation.

ui.gameover.sub.context: Game-over subtitle. {kills},{credits} are integers placed after labels, so no plural form is needed.

ui.gameover.back_to_hangar.context: Secondary button on the death/game-over overlay (only after the hangar shop is unlocked): return to the Hangar to shop / change loadout instead of an instant retry. Short.

ui.perf.context: Performance overlay (technical). {fps},{calls},{tris} integers, {ms} a decimal. 'draw' = draw calls, 'tris' = triangles. Keep it terse.

ui.perf.idle.context: Performance overlay placeholder before the first frame. Mirror ui.perf's labels.

ui.card.hull.context: Ship-picker card stat line. {hp} is an integer; 'HP' = hit points (may stay 'HP').

ui.card.weapons.context: Ship-picker card stat line. {summary} is a pre-built list like '2× gun · 1× rocket'.

ui.mount.gun.context: Weapon-count chip in a ship's weapon summary. {n} is an integer; the 'N×' notation deliberately avoids grammatical plurals.

ui.mount.rocket.context: Weapon-count chip in a ship's weapon summary. {n} is an integer; 'N×' notation avoids plurals.

ui.mount.unarmed.context: Weapon summary when a ship has no weapons.

ui.community.label.context: Link text to the game's Telegram community/feedback group. Shown on the welcome screen and the game-over/victory overlay.

ui.community.url.context: URL, not prose — do not translate the text. The 'en' value is the English Telegram group; the ru locale overrides it with the Russian group link.

ui.account.prompt_title.context: Title of the prompt shown right after clearing level 1, asking the player to pick a display name. 'Sentinel' is the player's title.

ui.account.prompt_msg.source: Choose a callsign. You can keep playing as a guest, or create an account to save your progress.
ui.account.prompt_msg.context: Subtitle under the level-1 name prompt. Explains they can stay a guest or make an account.

ui.account.create_msg.source: An account saves your progress and lets you play on other devices once your email is verified.

ui.account.login_msg.source: Log in to load your saved progress on this device.

ui.account.continue_anon.context: Button that keeps the player anonymous (saves only the username) on the level-1 prompt.

ui.account.create.context: Button that submits the registration form / reveals it from the guest prompt. Short.

ui.account.log_in.context: Button that submits the login form. Short.

ui.account.have_account.context: Link/button on the register form that switches to the login form.

ui.account.need_account.context: Link/button on the login form that switches to the register form.

ui.account.close.context: Button that dismisses the account dialog. Short.

ui.account.signed_in_as.context: Account status line on menu screens. {who} is the username or email.

ui.account.anon.context: Account status line shown when the player has no account yet.

ui.account.sign_in.context: Button on the account status bar that opens the login/register dialog. Short.

ui.account.log_out.context: Button that ends the session. Short.

ui.account.verify_nudge.source: Verify your email to sync across devices.
ui.account.verify_nudge.context: Reminder shown until the account's email is verified.

ui.account.resend.context: Button to resend the verification email. Short.

ui.account.resent.context: Confirmation shown on the resend button after a successful resend. Short.

ui.account.verified.source: Email verified — your progress now syncs across devices.
ui.account.verified.context: Confirmation shown after the player clicks the verification link and returns to the game.

ui.account.err_password.source: Password must be at least 8 characters.
ui.account.err_password.context: Validation error under the registration form.

ui.account.err_email_taken.source: That email is already in use.
ui.account.err_email_taken.context: Error when registering with an email that already has an account.

ui.account.err_credentials.context: Error shown on a failed login.

ui.account.err_network.context: Error shown when an account request fails to reach the server.

ui.account.err_generic.source: Something went wrong — please try again.
ui.account.err_generic.context: Fallback error for the account dialog.

ship.player_basic.name.context: Display name of the starter player ship on the ship-picker card. ≤24 chars. May stay English if there's no natural local form.

level.1.victory.context: Victory overlay subtitle after level 1. Upbeat. 'Sentinel' is the player's in-game title — keep it.

level.2.briefing.source: The pirates are storming our weapons factory — we have to push them back before they arm their fleet. Their heavier squadrons are dug in there, so command has refitted your ship: the basic gun is out, a Machine Gun is in. Go take it back, Sentinel.
level.2.briefing.context: Briefing paragraph shown after clearing level 1, before level 2. Explains the mission and that the player's gun was swapped for a Machine Gun. Keep 'Machine Gun' (a weapon name) and 'Sentinel' (the player's title).

level.2.victory.source: Level 2 cleared! The mid-boss is down.
level.2.victory.context: Victory overlay subtitle after level 2. Upbeat.

level.3.victory.context: Victory overlay subtitle after the final level. Celebratory. 'Sentinel' is the player's title.

level.3.briefing.source: Good news, Sentinel — we salvaged a spare repair drone and fitted it to your ship. It'll patch up your hull mid-fight, a little at a time. If you take heavy damage, peel off to a quiet corner of the map and let it work.
level.3.briefing.context: Briefing shown in the Hangar after clearing level 2, before level 3. Narrates installing a repair drone that slowly heals the hull during combat; advises retreating when badly hurt. Keep 'Sentinel' (the player's title).
